    <h1 {...{

    <p>{`This document lists the public APIs available in the Messaging extension for implementing Live Activities with Adobe Journey Optimizer.`}</p>

      "id": "registerliveactivities"

    <p>{`The `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`registerLiveActivities`}</inlineCode>{` API registers one or more Live Activity attribute types with the Messaging extension. Once registered, the extension automatically:`}</p>

      <li parentName="ul">{`Collects push-to-start tokens (iOS 17.2+)`}</li>

    <p>{`This API must be called after the Messaging extension has been registered with `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`MobileCore`}</inlineCode>{`. You should register all of your app's `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`LiveActivityAttributes`}</inlineCode>{` types that you want to be managed by Adobe Journey Optimizer.`}</p>
